ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol for trading */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" INTEGER /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company belongs to */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector within the industry */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the stock data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("exchange") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price accounting for corporate actions */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "yesterday_close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the previous day */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the stock */,
  "after_hours_price" REAL /* After-hours price of the stock */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day's closing price */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day's closing price */,
  "volume_change" INTEGER /* Change in volume from the previous day */,
  "volume_percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in volume from the previous day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the stock exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stock exchange is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the report is about */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, monthly, annual) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* A brief summary of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last modification of the report */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
